ukm:Metadata.dc:title: Finance Act 2003
ukm:Metadata.dc:description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt and the Public Revenue, and to make further provision in connection with finance.

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: This amendment not applied to legislation.gov.uk. The affecting S.I. is revoked and superseded by S.I. 2003/2816
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Stamp Duty and Stamp Duty Land Tax (Variation of the Finance Act 2003) Regulations 2003

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: This effect was superseded by the repeal of Sch. 12 para. 3 by Finance Act 2008 (c. 9), s. 129(4), Sch. 43 para. 16
ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: TOES: Effect is superseded by the repeal of Sch. 12 para. 3 by Finance Act 2008 (c. 9), s. 129(4), Sch. 43 para. 16 - TOES: Effect is superseded by the repeal of Sch. 12 para. 3 by Finance Act 2008 (c. 9), s. 129(4), Sch. 43 para. 16 - TOES: Effect is superseded by the repeal of Sch. 12 para. 3 by Finance Act 2008 (c. 9), s. 129(4), Sch. 43 para. 16

ukm:InForce.AppendedCommentary: (which transitional provisions in art. 4 are revoked (31.1.2011) by S.S.I. 2011/31, art. 5(c))

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: The amending provision was repealed before coming into force.
ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force. - TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force. - TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force.
TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force. - TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force. - TOES - Amending provision repealed before coming into force.
ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: The amending provision was repealed before coming into force.

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Type: savings for amendments by 2018 anaw 1, s. 6, Sch. 6
ukm:UnappliedEffect.Comments: This effect has been added as an appended commentary in the relevant effects in the TOES for 2018 anaw 1. No further action required.
ukm:UnappliedEffect.TypeNotes: savings for amendments by 2018 anaw 1, s. 6, Sch. 6
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Abolition of the Right to Buy and Associated Rights (Wales) Act 2018 (Consequential Amendments and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2019
Rheoliadau Deddf Diddymu’r Hawl i Brynu a Hawliau Cysylltiedig (Cymru) 2018 (Diwygiadau Canlyniadol a Darpariaethau Arbed) 2019

P2para.Text: The amount of tax chargeable in respect of a chargeable transaction to which this section applies is determined in accordance with subsections (1B) and (1C).

Text.Addition: This section applies to any chargeable transaction other than a transaction to which paragraph 3 of Schedule 4A or step 4 of section 74(1A) (higher rate for certain transactions) applies.
... the transaction is not one of a number of linked transactions, the amount of tax chargeable is determined as follows—
Apply the rates specified in the second column of
below to the parts of the relevant consideration specified in the first column of

Addition.Addition: (a) Table A, if the relevant land consists entirely of residential property, and
(b) Table B, if the relevant land consists of or includes land that is not residential property.

Text.Addition: Add together the amounts calculated at Step 1 (if there are two or more such amounts).

xhtml:td.Addition: So much as does not exceed £125,000
So much as exceeds £125,000 but does not exceed £250,000
So much as exceeds £250,000 but does not exceed £925,000
So much as exceeds £925,000 but does not exceed £1,500,000

Addition.Addition: So much as does not exceed £150,000
So much as exceeds £150,000 but does not exceed £250,000

Text.Addition: ... the transaction is one of a number of linked transactions, the amount of tax chargeable in respect of the particular transaction under consideration is determined as follows—
Apply the rates specified in the second column of
in subsection (1B) to the parts of the relevant consideration specified in the first column of

Addition.Addition: (a) Table A, if the relevant land consists entirely of residential property, and
(b) Table B, if the relevant land consists of or includes land that is not residential property.

Text.Addition: Add together the amounts calculated at Step 1 (if there are two or more such amounts).
Multiply the amount given by Step 1 or Step 2, as the case may be, by—
C is the chargeable consideration for the transaction, and

P3para.Text: the relevant land is the land an interest in which is the main subject-matter of the transaction, and
the relevant consideration is the chargeable consideration for the transaction
the relevant land is any land an interest in which is the main subject-matter of any of the linked transactions, and
the relevant consideration is the total of the chargeable consideration for all those transactions.

Text.Addition: Schedule 4ZA (higher rates for additional dwellings and dwellings purchased by companies) modifies this section as it applies for the purpose of determining the amount of tax chargeable in respect of certain transactions involving major interests in dwellings.

P2para.Text: This section has effect subject to—

Para.Text: section 74(1B) (exercise of collective rights by tenants of flats), ...

P2para.Text: (which provides for the amount of tax to be determined by reference to a fraction of the relevant consideration).
In the case of a transaction for which the whole or part of the chargeable consideration is rent this section has effect subject to section 56 and Schedule 5 (amount of tax chargeable: rent).

Para.Text: Pt. 4 wholly in force at Royal Assent subject to Sch. 19, see s. 124, Sch. 19 para. 1(1)
Pt. 4 construed as one with S.I. 2006/575, reg. 43 (6.4.2006) by The Pension Protection Fund (Tax) Regulations 2006 (S.I. 2006/575), regs. 1, 43(4)
Pt. 4 modified (coming into force at 2 p.m. on 6.12.2006) by The Stamp Duty Land Tax (Variation of the Finance Act 2003) Regulations 2006 (S.I. 2006/3237), regs. 1, 2, Sch.
S. 55(4) excluded (with effect in accordance with reg. 1(2) of the amending S.I.) by The Stamp Duty Land Tax (Zero-Carbon Homes Relief) Regulations 2007 (S.I. 2007/3437), regs. 1(1), 9 (with reg. 3)
Words in s. 55(5) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 80(7) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2009 (c. 10), s. 80(6)

Words in s. 55(5) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 29(4) of the amending Act) by virtue of Scotland Act 2012 (c. 11), s. 44(2)(b)(3)(b), Sch. 3 para. 5(a) (with s. 29(5)(6)); S.I. 2015/637, art. 2
Word in s. 55(5) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 29(4) of the amending Act) by Scotland Act 2012 (c. 11), s. 44(2)(b)(3)(b), Sch. 3 para. 5(b) (with s. 29(5)(6)); S.I. 2015/637, art. 2
S. 55(1A) inserted (with effect in accordance with Sch. 35 para. 10 of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2012 (c. 14), Sch. 35 para. 2(3)
Words in s. 55(1) inserted (with effect in accordance with Sch. 35 para. 10 of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2012 (c. 14), Sch. 35 para. 2(2)
Pt. 4 modified (17.7.2013) by Finance Act 2013 (c. 29), s. 194(8)-(12)
Pt. 4 applied (17.7.2014) by Finance Act 2014 (c. 26), ss. 223(8)(9)(d)
S. 55(1B)(1C) inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 2(2) of the amending Act) by Stamp Duty Land Tax Act 2015 (c. 1), s. 1(3) (with s. 2(3)-(6))
Words in s. 55(4) inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 2(2) of the amending Act) by Stamp Duty Land Tax Act 2015 (c. 1), s. 1(6) (with s. 2(3)-(6))
Words in s. 55(1) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 2(2) of the amending Act) by Stamp Duty Land Tax Act 2015 (c. 1), s. 1(2) (with s. 2(3)-(6))
S. 55(7) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 2(2) of the amending Act) by virtue of Stamp Duty Land Tax Act 2015 (c. 1), s. 1(7) (with s. 2(3)-(6))
S. 55(1B) Table B inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(3)(c)
S. 55(4A) inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 128(5)(6) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 128(2)
S. 55(2) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(5)
Words in s. 55(4) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(7)(a)
Word in s. 55(5) substituted (15.9.2016) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 132(a)
Word in s. 55(5) substituted (15.9.2016) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 132(b)
Words in s. 55(1) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(2)
Words in s. 55(3) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(6)(a)
Words in s. 55(1B) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(3)(a)
Words in s. 55(1B) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(3)(b)(i)
Words in s. 55(1B) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(3)(b)(ii)
Words in s. 55(1B) inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(3)(b)(iii)
Words in s. 55(1C) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(4)(a)
Words in s. 55(1C) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(4)(b)(i)
Words in s. 55(1C) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(4)(b)(ii)
Words in s. 55(1C) inserted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(4)(b)(iii)
Words in s. 55(3)(b) omitted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by virtue of Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(6)(b)
Words in s. 55(4)(a) substituted (with effect in accordance with s. 127(12)(13) of the amending Act) by Finance Act 2016 (c. 24), s. 127(7)(b)
Pt. 4 modified (temp.) (22.7.2020) by Stamp Duty Land Tax (Temporary Relief) Act 2020 (c. 15), s. 1 (as amended (10.6.2021) by 2021 c. 26, s. 87(2))
Pt. 4 modified (temp.) (10.6.2021) by 2020 c. 15, s. 1A (as inserted by Finance Act 2021 (c. 26), s. 87(3))
S. 55(1B) modified (temp.) (22.7.2020) by Stamp Duty Land Tax (Temporary Relief) Act 2020 (c. 15), s. 1 (as amended 10.6.2021) by 2021 c. 26, s. 87(2))
S. 55(1B) modified (temp.) (8.2.2023) by Stamp Duty Land Tax (Temporary Relief) Act 2023 (c. 2), s. 1
Pt. 4 modified (19.3.2025) by The Co-ownership Contractual Schemes (Tax) Regulations 2025 (S.I. 2025/200), regs. 1(2), 28, 30 (with reg. 63)
Pt. 4 applied (19.3.2025) by The Co-ownership Contractual Schemes (Tax) Regulations 2025 (S.I. 2025/200), regs. 1(2), 29(2)(5) (with reg. 63)
